title: The Four-Wheeled Wagon
description: An interactive visual metaphor showing the four habits of a digital citizen — Etiquette, Ethics, Law, and Safety — as four wheels on a wagon. Click each wheel to learn what that habit means.
creator: Digital Citizenship for Grade 5 (ISD 197)
subject: digital citizenship
etiquette
ethics
law
online safety
learning_objective: Students will be able to explain the four habits of a digital citizen (Etiquette, Ethics, Law, and Safety) and describe why all four are needed together.
chapter_title: Chapter 2: What Is a Digital Citizen?
